Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x2C5A "AUTOTEST-2C5A" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Autotest.prg"
Metadata.Notes: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $2CC1. However the true start address is $2C5A.
